channel.title: This Package can ---- the React elements it needs
channel.description:
Hey guys, I'm just learning about Frontity and looks very interesting! Thanks for the product. I'm excited to test!
https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/3.-roots-and-fills At this page, looks like is missing a word at the sentence below:
"This package can **[MISSING WORD]** the React elements it needs in its root and expose an action like `actions.share.openModal()` to interact with the theme. The root could be something like this:"

item.title: This Package can ---- the React elements it needs
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Hi @lincolnlemos!

You’re totally right I’ve already changed it, thank you very much for noticing it!

If you have any questions about the framework don’t hesitate to ask us. And if you start testing it, let us know if we can help anyway.

Read full topic
item.source: This Package can ---- the React elements it needs

item.title: This Package can ---- the React elements it needs
item.dc:creator: lincolnlemos
item.description:
Hey guys, I’m just learning about Frontity and looks very interesting! Thanks for the product. I’m excited to test!

https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/3.-roots-and-fills
At this page, looks like is missing a word at the sentence below:

“This package can [MISSING WORD] the React elements it needs in its root and expose an action like actions.share.openModal() to interact with the theme. The root could be something like this:”

Read full topic
item.source: This Package can ---- the React elements it needs
